# Chuck Reynolds

> Staff Product Manager, Growth at Wikimedia Enterprise, the commercial API
> platform for Wikipedia, Wikidata, and the Wikimedia projects. AI training
> data, retrieval and grounding, enterprise API strategy, and developer
> experience.

This is a single-page personal site. The homepage contains the complete
content; every other link here points off-site. Contact: hello@chuckreynolds.com

## Main

- [Chuck Reynolds](https://chuckreynolds.com/): Bio, current work, background, contact.

## Work

- [Wikimedia Enterprise](https://enterprise.wikimedia.com): Training-data and retrieval APIs for Wikipedia and sibling projects.
- [Structured Wikipedia on Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/datasets/wikimedia/structured-wikipedia): Public dataset built from the structured-contents pipeline.
- [Vuurr](https://vuurr.com): Digital intelligence firm. Partner since 2011.
- [Rynoweb](https://rynoweb.com): Web tech consultancy, running since 2001.
- [OrbitHull](https://orbithull.com): Modular cargo containers for orbital tasking.

- [UpChuck](https://upchuck.us): Blog.
